calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Continued To Feb-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Adil Wakil and Lori Wakil appeared via zoom pro per (co-executors).

Mr. Wakil stated that they submitted their information to the probate referee, that they are just waiting to hear back from him, that most of the accounts were payable at death, that they have excluded the Arab bank and the real property in Jordan.
The Court encouraged parties to seek assistance from the Access center, as they may qualify for a small estate affidavit.

The matter is continued to February 18, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Jan-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Dec-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Adil Wakil and Lori Wakil, Proposed Co-Administrators.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 14, 2014, is admitted to probate. Adil Wakil and Lori Wakil are appointed as the Executors with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing on filing the final Inventory and Appraisal is set for November 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. No appearance will be necessary if the Inventory and Appraisal is filed two weeks prior. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
